function_header.overflow_strategy: SmallFuncHeader either stores compact fields directly or encodes a large header offset when flags.overflowed is set

notes: function bytecode may be deduplicated during layout
opcode bytes are serialized first; jump tables follow after 4-byte alignment

subsections.name: exception_handler_table
notes: present only when the function has exception handlers

subsections.name: debug_offsets
notes: present only when debug info is not stripped and the function has debug info
function info is serialized after all function bodies
BF.infoOffset points to the start of this aligned info block
serialized within the function info area
serialized within the function info area

subsections.name: debug_data
notes: contains source locations and lexical data; lexicalDataOffset points into this blob

debug_info.strip_behavior: when stripDebugInfoSection is enabled, an empty DebugInfoHeader is still serialized
notes: debugInfoOffset in the file header points here

string_table.overflow_strategy: small entries mark overflowed offset/length and reference overflow table indices
notes: string storage is serialized separately as a raw blob
first half of BytecodeModule object buffer pair
second half of BytecodeModule object buffer pair

cjs_module_table.entry_type: pair<uint32_t, uint32_t> or static module entry
cjs_module_table.storage: dynamic pairs or static table depending on bytecode options

footer.hash_description: SHA1 of all bytes above the footer
notes: serialized even during layout, with a zero/ignored hash until the final pass

sections.name: small_string_table
notes: includes overflow markers pointing into overflow_string_table

sections.name: overflow_string_table
notes: present when small string table entries overflow offset or length

sections.name: cjs_module_table
notes: dynamic pairs or static table depending on bytecode options

sections.name: function_bodies
notes: jump tables are aligned to 4 bytes after opcode blocks
optional body padding may be emitted when padFunctionBodiesPercent is enabled

sections.name: function_info
notes: contains overflowed large headers when needed
contains exception handler tables and debug offsets
serializer pads exception/debug-info subsections to INFO_ALIGNMENT

sections.name: debug_info
notes: serialized even in stripped mode as an empty DebugInfoHeader

sections.name: file_footer
notes: contains the SHA1 file hash of everything above the footer
container sections are derived from visitBytecodeSegmentsInOrder and BytecodeSerializer::serialize

fields.name: strings
fields.source: normalized from small/overflow string tables + storage

notes: module is the stable semantic root over the raw container
semantic module intentionally hides alignment, padding, and overflow-header details
semantic function is intended to remain mostly stable across bytecode versions

fields.name: operands
fields.source: decoded and typed via bytecode spec

fields.name: branch_targets
fields.source: normalized from jump operands and switch tables

notes: semantic instruction is normalized over short/long encoding details where practical
exception handlers are function-local semantic ranges

fields.name: lexical_data
fields.source: decoded from DebugInfo data blob using lexicalDataOffset

notes: semantic debug info hides the packed file format and offset indirections

fields.name: entries
fields.source: dynamic or static cjs module section

notes: semantic layer is analysis-facing and should be more stable across bytecode versions than the raw container
this layer is currently a target schema; full population will come with binary parsing and lifting
